news.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

news.title: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

news.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

news.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

news.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

news.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta

news.title: George Lucas Is Pro AI, Which Shouldn’t Be a Surprise
news.description: [GIZMODO] The creator of 'Star Wars' and ILM thinks artificial intelligence is the future of filmmaking.

news.title: What Is Going on With NVIDIA Stock on Tuesday?
news.description: [BENZINGA] NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) stock rallied nearly 3% on Tuesday as global tech buyers flooded back into artificial intelligence leaders, backed by an aggressive $330 price target hike from KeyBanc.

news.title: BCG sees wider AI execution gap in India as marketers prepare for agentic AI
news.description: [THE ECONOMIC TIMES] Indian marketers embrace artificial intelligence with high ambition and investment. However, many companies mistake experimentation for true transformation and measurable impact. The gap between ambition and reality is wider in India than globally....

news.title: Hamilton is on the verge of a data centre moratorium vote. Others are taking notice.
news.description: [GLOBAL NEWS] Hamilton would join a wave of cities in the United States who have passed similar pauses for possible artificial intelligence data centres.

news.title: SoftBank Group's CEO says $5 trillion a year needed globally to meet AI demand
news.description: [CNBC TV18] Worries about a bubble in artificial intelligence investments are absurd, SoftBank Group’s CEO Masayoshi Son said Tuesday, deriding such doubts as backward and akin to questioning the use of cars and planes.
